creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
FYI, the PR's submitter is unreachable at least for me, as I received the
following response:

> A message that you sent could not be delivered to one or more of its
> recipients. This is a permanent error. The following address(es) failed:
> 
>   mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net
>     SMTP error from remote mail server after RCPT TO:<mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net>:
>     host rachie.is-a-geek.net [66.230.99.27]: 554 5.7.1 <mel@rachie.is-a-geek.net>:
>     Recipient address rejected: Access denied

Regards,
Stefan
